com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.exceptions.PersistenceException

Description
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence
 

  • Uses of PersistenceException in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence

    Methods in com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.persistence that throw PersistenceException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    GamePersistenceManager.deleteSave()
    Deletes the save file if it exists.
    static String
    GamePersistenceManager.loadNickname()
    Reads and returns the stored nickname, or null if the player file does not exist yet.
    static GameSession
    GamePersistenceManager.loadSession()
    Deserializes and returns the saved GameSession, or null if no save file exists.
    static void
    GamePersistenceManager.saveNickname(String nickname)
    Writes the player's nickname to the plain-text player file, overwriting any previous value.
    static void
    GamePersistenceManager.saveSession(GameSession session)
    Serializes session and writes it to the save file, overwriting any existing save.
